subject: Watch your inbox tomorrow @9am PST / 12pm EST
body:
Only 24 hours away… [Sneak peek]

Mozination…

24 hours from now…we're going live. Tap either one & add to your calendar:

Add to Google Calendar

Calendar File (iOS / Android)

…and the brand new 100M Money Models book will be yours…and other special surprises - but only if you show up LIVE (Aug 16th 9am PT / 12pm ET)…

Here's what we're covering during the 100M Money Models Book launch:

- How Money Models are the engine behind all the companies I've scaled and how to wield them

- How I used Money Models in the book to get over 500,000+ people to register for the live book launch…at a profit

- The Secret Project I spent this last year working on…that every single person gets ONLY WHEN you show up live.

- 5 mystery headliners

Plus 10 VIPs will be randomly selected LIVE to fly out to Vegas to spend a day with me*.

If you're not a VIP you still have a few hours to get your free upgrade (by preordering a single book).

See you tomorrow.

Alex

PS - Tap this to save to your calendar. I'll send you a text too. It's go time!

PPS - I will start ON TIME. So…be there 15 min early so you don't have any issues joining. (You shouldn't have any because you just need to hit a YouTube link).

PPPS - Leave cookies & milk out tonight because it's entrepreneur Christmas Eve and I'm coming with boxes of gifts for everyone.
